nasb.text: From the tribe of Gad, they gave Ramoth in Gilead, the city of refuge for the manslayer, with its pasture lands and Mahanaim with its pasture lands,

esv.text: and out of the tribe of Gad, Ramoth in Gilead with its pasturelands, the city of refuge for the manslayer, Mahanaim with its pasturelands,

cnv.text: 以色列人又從迦得支派中，把誤殺人者的避難城，就是在基列的拉末和拉末的郊野，給了他們；又給他們瑪哈念和瑪哈念的郊野，

ccb.text: 迦得支派的玛哈念、基列的避难城拉末、
